tool_args.label: NYCT Committee ACTIONS and PRESENTATIONS SUMMARY for JULY 2023

payload.title: NYCT Committee ACTIONS and PRESENTATIONS SUMMARY for JULY 2023

payload.description: MTA operating agency seeking Board approval for procurement actions
NYC Transit department requesting procurement, headed by Frank Annicaro

payload.role: Senior Vice President, Buses, NYCT / Requesting Department Head

payload.title: MTA Deputy Chief Procurement Officer – Procurement Operations

payload.description: Bus manufacturer and vendor for 60 all-electric buses contract
Board approved the base contract with New Flyer in the amount of $63,531,289
Contract awarded to New Flyer in the amount of $63,531,289
Disruption to a sub-supplier of the battery manufacturer caused a 4-month schedule revision
NYC Transit added 9 additional weeks to schedule for additional testing requirements at no additional cost
Contractor was directed to execute this modification; agreement reached on schedule adjustment and compensation
Staff summary prepared and reviewed for Board approval
NYC Transit Committee meeting to consider the procurement action
MTA Board meeting to consider the procurement action
Delivery of production buses now scheduled to begin in March 2024
Delivery of production buses now scheduled to be completed in September 2024

tool_args.label: Thermal Event on Electric Bus in Connecticut

payload.description: Following a thermal event on an all-electric bus in Connecticut, NYC Transit met with New Flyer to discuss need for early warning detection system on high-voltage battery storage system

tool_args.label: Contract B40676R Modification - New Flyer 60 Electric Buses

payload.project_name: Contract B40676R Modification - New Flyer 60 Electric Buses
payload.description: Modification to competitively negotiated purchase contract with New Flyer of America, Inc. to extend delivery schedule and develop/install an early warning detection system for thermal events on 60 low-floor 40-foot all-electric buses
payload.agency: New York City Transit, Department of Buses

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Modification amount for contract B40676R to extend delivery schedule and develop early warning detection system
Original contract amount awarded to New Flyer for 60 all-electric buses

tool_args.label: Modification as Percent of Current Amount

payload.description: This request as a percentage of current contract amount
NYC Transit compensates New Flyer at $79,890 per bus for schedule adjustment
60 low-floor 40-foot all-electric buses under contract
93 months from Notice of Award, inclusive of delivery and warranty support

tool_args.label: No Commercially Available Early Warning Detection System

payload.claim_text: No such system was commercially available at the time of award from any all-electric bus manufacturer in the United States
payload.subject: early warning detection system for thermal events on all-electric buses

tool_args.label: New Flyer Develops System at No Cost

payload.claim_text: New Flyer agreed to develop the new system and retrofit all 60 of the buses purchased under this contract at no cost
payload.subject: early warning detection system development by New Flyer

payload.claim_text: This procurement action will utilize Capital funding
payload.subject: funding source for procurement

payload.claim_text: NYC Transit is seeking Board approval to memorialize the modification to a competitively negotiated purchase contract with New Flyer of America, Inc.
payload.subject: procurement type

payload.claim_text: The final pricing for this modification was agreed upon at the time of negotiation and has been reviewed and found to be fair and reasonable
payload.subject: pricing review

tool_args.label: New Flyer Not Doing Business in Russia

payload.claim_text: New Flyer has certified that pursuant to EO 16, it is not doing business in Russia
payload.subject: New Flyer certification

tool_args.label: Schedule Adjustments at No Additional Cost

payload.claim_text: These adjustments resulted in a revised schedule for the production buses to be delivered between November 2023 and June 2024 and were made with no additional cost to NYC Transit
payload.subject: schedule adjustment costs
